name: @hasna/attachments-sdk
description: Zero-dependency TypeScript client for @hasna/attachments REST API

scripts.build: rm -rf dist && bun build src/index.ts --outdir dist --target node && bunx tsc src/index.ts --declaration --emitDeclarationOnly --outDir dist --target ES2022 --module ESNext --moduleResolution Bundler --skipLibCheck --lib ES2022,DOM --types bun
